name: easymodal
description: Deploy ComfyUI on Modal by pasting two keys. The missing UI.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c blue,green "npm -w apps/web run dev" "npm -w apps/server run dev"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm -w packages/shared run build && npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/server run build
scripts.start: npm run build && npm -w apps/server run start
